parameters.content:
## Store in Google Sheets

The final output step that writes the formatted property data into Google Sheets.

parameters.jsCode:
// Format Idealista property data into clean spreadsheet columns
// Customize: add or remove fields to match your needs

return $input.all().map(item => {
  const p = item.json;
  return {
    json: {
      title: p.title || '',
      price: p.price || '',
      pricePerM2: p.priceByArea || p.unitPrice || '',
      size: p.size || '',
      rooms: p.rooms || '',
      bathrooms: p.bathrooms || '',
      floor: p.floor || '',
      address: p.address || '',
      neighborhood: p.neighborhood || '',
      district: p.district || '',
      municipality: p.municipality || '',
      province: p.province || '',
      latitude: p.latitude || '',
      longitude: p.longitude || '',
      propertyType: p.propertyType || '',
      description: (p.description || '').substring(0, 500),
      hasElevator: p.hasLift || false,
      hasParking: p.hasParkingSpace || false,
      hasSwimmingPool: p.hasSwimmingPool || false,
      hasTerrace: p.hasTerrace || false,
      hasGarden: p.hasGarden || false,
      hasAirConditioning: p.hasAirConditioning || false,
      isNewDevelopment: p.newDevelopment || false,
      agencyName: p.contactName || '',
      agencyPhone: p.contactPhone || '',
      url: p.url || '',
      thumbnail: p.thumbnail || '',
      numPhotos: p.numPhotos || 0,
      scrapedAt: new Date().toISOString()
    }
  };
});

parameters.content:
## Untitled workflow

### How it works

1. The workflow starts manually when the user triggers it.
2. It scrapes Idealista property listings from the configured source.
3. It formats the scraped property data into clean spreadsheet columns.
4. It saves the structured results into Google Sheets.

### Setup steps

- [ ] Connect the Idealista scraping node to the target listings source and confirm any search filters or scraping parameters.
- [ ] Set up Google Sheets credentials and grant access to the destination spreadsheet.
- [ ] Choose or create the target spreadsheet and worksheet/tab for storing the listings.
- [ ] Verify the code formatting step matches the desired column names and data shape before writing to Sheets.

### Customization

Adjust the scraper query, output columns, and Google Sheets destination tab to match the property data you want to collect.

## Manual workflow start

A small entry-point cluster that begins the workflow when run manually.

## Scrape and format listings

The central processing cluster that pulls Idealista listings and cleans the data into spreadsheet-ready fields.
